title: Release Center (Operion release orchestration)
description: Owner release orchestration: Publish Review, approval gate, publish execution, history + rollback. Upstream-only control plane for operating the Operion platform itself.
exclusions: Entire Release Center subsystem: it orchestrates releases OF the Operion platform and has no meaning in a downstream product.
compatibilityNotes: EXCLUDED BY POLICY. This is the canonical exclusion example. Downstream products are release TARGETS, not release operators.

history.note: Registered as a permanent exclusion (upstream-only subsystem).

Exclusion ENFORCED downstream: the read-only Release Center was removed from Supercharged in PR #8 (commit 6669b54 — 5 files + its test deleted). Remains a permanent exclusion; no residual routes/nav in supercharged main.
